name: Pane Bianco
teaser: The pizza I eat the most in Los Angeles, by a wide margin. Best-traveling thin crust I've ever encountered.
review:
Bianco's other spot is the pizza I eat the most in Los Angeles by a wide margin. The NY-style pies (18" but not typical NY) are heartier and crispier thanks to a longer bake in the electric oven and some dough tweaks.

This is the best-traveling thin crust I've ever encountered â it's just as good, if not better, on reheats. And though they're only open 11 AMâ4 PM, I can assure you that the slices keep well all weekend.
headsUp: Closes at 4 PM sharp. Do not sleep on it.
update: Still the most consistent slice shop in LA.
address: 1320 E 7th St Suite 100, Los Angeles, CA 90021, USA
hours: Monday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Tuesday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Wednesday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Thursday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Friday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Saturday: 11:00 AM – 9:00 PM · Sunday: 11:00 AM – 4:00 PM
